name: Fence: Specialized SLM Guardrails for LLM Applications
summary: arXiv:2607.18268v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Real-world applications that use closed-source large language models (LLMs) need advanced safety measures that go beyond the basic content filters. C...
description: arXiv:2607.18268v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Real-world applications that use closed-source large language models (LLMs) need advanced safety measures that go beyond the basic content filters. Content moderation filters such as toxicity and bias have relatively standard definitions where as application specific guardrails like hallucination, topic drift and behaviour deviation are more diffi...
author: Kumud Lakara, Ruibo Shi, Fran Silavong
